subcodes.title: Prayer for Mulla Hasan
subcodes.first_line: O loved one! Stand at the door of the One Who Answers, and trust in God, my Lord and your Lord. There is no God but Him, the Hearing, the Knowing
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. یا ایها الحبیب قف علی باب المجیب و اتکل علی الله ربی و ربک الذی لا الله الا هو السمیع العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power of prayer, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
